meshIP.description: Allocated IP within the meshCIDR, e.g. 10.200.0.5

allowedIPs.description: CIDRs this node advertises (for subnet routing)

addedAt.description: When this node was added to the network

expiresAt.description: When this node membership expires; omitted means never expires

memberDID.description: Legacy alias for ownerDID. The wallet/member DID that owns this node. Defaults to the node DID for local-only devices.

ownerDID.description: The wallet/member DID that owns this node. Defaults to the node DID for local-only devices.

delegateDID.description: The local delegate/session DID that currently has wallet grants to operate this node.

sourceDWN.description: The DWN endpoint where the device's authoritative records live (for cross-DWN member devices)

nodeKeyDelivery.description: Public key material used by the anchor to encrypt delivered mesh context keys to this node

rootKeyId.description: The node's root encryption key ID

x.description: Base64url-encoded X25519 public key derived for key delivery

kid.description: Optional key ID; rootKeyId is authoritative when present
